name: @shah1900/mcp-db-api-tools
description: Local MCP servers for Cursor: Database Inspector (read-only MySQL) and API Runner (Bearer auth). Debug and verify your API with AI.

scripts.postinstall:
node -e "console.log('
✅ @shah1900/mcp-db-api-tools installed!

📋 Next steps:
  1. mkdir -p .mcp-cheatsheet
  2. cp node_modules/@shah1900/mcp-db-api-tools/.env.example .mcp-cheatsheet/.env
  3. Edit .mcp-cheatsheet/.env with your DB and API credentials
  4. Create .cursor/mcp.json (see README)
  5. Add .mcp-cheatsheet/ to .gitignore
  6. Restart Cursor

📖 Full docs: node_modules/@shah1900/mcp-db-api-tools/README.md
')"

author: Shah Shahbaz <shahbaz.sa305@gmail.com>
